title: Hatgadh Fort
tagline: Hatgadh Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Hatgad Fort is a fort located 71 km (44 mi)from Nashik, Nashik district, of Maharashtra.
overview.description: Hatgad Fort is a fort located 71 km (44 mi)from Nashik, Nashik district, of Maharashtra. The base village is Hatgad on the Nashik-Saputara Road. The nearest town is Saputara, which is 6 km from Hatgad village. It is a historic monument located in Maharashtra, India, south of the hill station of Saputara and near the border with Gujarat.

topPlaces.name: Saputara Lake
topPlaces.description: Saputara Lake is a man made lake situated in Dang district in the Indian state of Gujarat. The lake is 1 kilometer from the main city hill station Saputara town, which is a tourist destination.

topPlaces.name: Saputara
topPlaces.description: Saputara town in the Dang district of Gujarat, India, is a hill station located in the Sahyadris or Western Ghats. It is a well-known tourist destination.

topPlaces.name: Saputara ropeway
topPlaces.description: Saputara ropeway, officially Pushpak ropeway, is a ropeway in Saputara, Dang district, Gujarat, India.

items.note: Saputara Lake is a man made lake situated in Dang district in the Indian state of Gujarat. The lake is 1 kilometer from the main city hill station Saputara town, which is a tourist destination.
Saputara town in the Dang district of Gujarat, India, is a hill station located in the Sahyadris or Western Ghats. It is a well-known tourist destination.
Saputara ropeway, officially Pushpak ropeway, is a ropeway in Saputara, Dang district, Gujarat, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Hatgadh Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Hatgadh Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Hatgadh Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Shirdi Airport (115 km) and the nearest railway station is Nashik Road (66 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Hatgadh Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Hatgadh Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Hatgadh Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Hatgadh Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Hatgadh Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Saputara Lake, Saputara, Saputara ropeway.
